## Compatibility Checklist

- [ ] This keeps UDP discovery on port `45678` compatible.
- [ ] This keeps `/api/state`, `/api/inbox/message`, and `/api/inbox/file` compatible, or documents any protocol change.
- [ ] This does not add a required cloud service, account system, or external relay.
- [ ] This does not silently overwrite received files.
